utility_evaluation.REASONING: Required format has 7 items: destination; travel_dates; transportation (flight details with costs); accommodation (hotel selection with costs); activities (selected activities with costs); additional_services (any extra services with costs); total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes 7 top-level items with names matching the format. Now check full specification details: 1) destination: provided (OK). 2) travel_dates: specific dates provided (OK). 3) transportation: requires flight details with costs; package includes only local_transit and a total_transport_cost—no flight details (NOT OK). 4) accommodation: hotel selection with costs; includes a hostel name and cost (OK). 5) activities: selected activities with costs; only general items plus a total_activity_cost, but no per-activity costs (ambiguous). The format only says 'selected activities with costs'—at least costs must be specified; a total cost is given but individual activity costs are not, so it's not fully specified (NOT OK). 6) additional_services: extra services with costs; meals listed and meal_cost provided (OK). 7) total_budget: complete cost breakdown; only a single total number given, not a breakdown, and transportation/activities lack detail; thus 'complete cost breakdown' is not satisfied (NOT OK). So included fully: destination, travel_dates, accommodation, additional_services = 4/7.
